result.post_video_description: The video displays the Garuda Pancasila, Indonesia\'s national emblem, prominently featuring an eagle with outstretched wings clutching a shield, set against a backdrop of vertical columns. The Indonesian flag, with its red and white stripes, waves in the foreground, partially covering the emblem. A statue of soldiers is visible behind the Garuda Pancasila, adding a historical element. Text overlay reads "Selamat Hari Kesaktian Pancasila 1 Oktober 2025" in bold white letters, with "Joko Widodo" credited at the bottom. The composition includes a clear, high-quality image of national symbols and text.

result.post_video_description: The video features a man speaking at what appears to be a public event or talk show, with a microphone in hand. He is wearing a hat and glasses, and there is a text overlay in Indonesian. The setting includes a table with a cup labeled "chocolate" and a sign that reads "Indonesia Lawyers Club," indicating a formal discussion or debate. The post text criticizes the current state of Pancasila, Indonesia's foundational philosophical principles, suggesting that it no longer provides life and hope for the country. It also mentions the suffering of the people and proposes the death penalty as an effective measure against corruption. The video frames are watermarked with Instagram, indicating it was originally posted there. The overall tone of the video and post is serious and critical of the political situation in Indonesia.

result.text:
Sekedar pengingat:
NU dipecah belah. PARPOL diacak-acak. TNI-POLRI diracun tanpa meritokrasi. KPK dibuntungi. KEJAKSAAN dibuat tak bernyali. MK dibajak. Konstitusi dirusak.

Anaknya dipaksakan harus jadi Wapres. Anak yang satu lagi diatur supaya jadi ketua Parpol. Mantunya dijadikan gubernur. Mereka adalah yang konon "lebih suka berbisnis daripada berpolitik", katanya. Benar-benar di tangan pembual, negara ini kayak milik mbahnya sendiri.

Anehnya, manusia macam begitu masih saja dijadikan berhala. Tololnya lagi, masih ada pulak penyembahnya...
